title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 59-A. LOUISIANA MILITARY MEDICS

AND CORPSMEN PILOT PROGRAM

§3661. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Military Medics and Corpsmen Pilot Program".

            Acts 2017, No. 1, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 59-A.  LOUISIANA MILITARY MEDICS
AND CORPSMEN PILOT PROGRAM
§3661.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Military Medics and
Corpsmen Pilot Program".
Acts 2017, No. 1, §1.
